task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "接收用户输入的微信文章链接"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "使用正则表达式验证链接格式是否符合微信文章的标准"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "判断链接格式是否有效，无效则返回错误提示"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "设置HTTP请求头以伪装浏览器访问"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "发起HEAD请求以检测链接的可访问性"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "处理重定向并检查响应状态码"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "根据状态码返回相应结果（如200、404或其他异常）"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "捕获网络异常并返回错误信息"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "发送GET请求获取微信文章页面内容"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "解析HTML页面结构，定位主标题标签"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "提取主标题文本并清理特殊字符"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "解析HTML页面结构，定位副标题标签"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "提取副标题文本并清理特殊字符"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "返回抓取结果（包括主标题、副标题及提示信息）"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "inputValidation"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "formatCheck"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "proceedIfValid"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "requestSetup"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "checkAccessibility"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "statusEvaluation"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node8", "type": "catchException"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node9", "type": "proceedToContentExtraction"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "parseMainTitle"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "extractAndCleanMainTitle"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "parseSubTitle"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "extractAndCleanSubTitle"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "returnResult"}]}
